service.name: Infermedica API
service.description_for_ai: AI-powered symptom checker and medical triage API. Identify possible conditions from symptoms. Used by 100+ healthcare companies. Use for preliminary symptom assessment, triage, health apps. Always recommend consulting a doctor.

auth.cost: Free sandbox. Production pricing on request

capabilities.description_for_ai: Extract symptoms from natural language text. Use to convert user description to structured symptom IDs.

text.description: Natural language symptom description e.g. I have headache and fever

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get possible diagnoses based on symptoms. Returns conditions with probability scores. Always show medical disclaimer.

agent_hints.disclaimer: ALWAYS add: This is not medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional.
agent_hints.flow: 1) parse_symptoms to get IDs from text. 2) diagnose with those IDs. 3) Show results with disclaimer.
